book_summary: 3 John has complete one-chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layer. The letter preserves truth-walking, hospitality as partnership with truth, Gaius as faithful host, Diotrephes as an anti-domination example, and Demetrius as one witnessed by truth.
translation_notes: Hospitality is active partnership with truth.
Diotrephes is a leadership-abuse warning: loving first-place, refusing accountability, blocking hospitality, and casting people out.
Gaius' prosperity/health language should not be turned into a prosperity formula.
source_witness_audit_flags: 3 John Diotrephes leadership-abuse reception history and hospitality ethics.
